title: astragalus hotianensis
intro: Astragalus hotianensis, also known as the Hotian astragalus or milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fatigue and improving immune function, as well as exerting antioxidant and anti-aging effects. Astragalus hotianensis can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts for consumption, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional formulas to enhance its therapeutic effects.
